Container.Name: GitHub Actions Runner & Azure Pipelines Agent
Container.Overview: Self-hosted GitHub Actions Runner and Azure Pipelines Agent for Unraid. Run GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps Pipelines, or both from one container. Includes PowerShell 7 and optional embedded Docker build support.

Config.Name: Runner Data
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for runner configuration, work folders, updates, and embedded Docker data.

Config.Name: Use Azure Pipelines Agent
Config.Description: Set to true to enable the Azure Pipelines Agent.

Config.Name: Azure DevOps URL
Config.Description: Azure DevOps organization URL, for example https://dev.azure.com/myorg.

Config.Name: Azure DevOps PAT
Config.Description: Azure DevOps PAT with Agent Pools Read & manage permissions.

Config.Name: Azure Agent Name
Config.Description: Name of the Azure Pipelines Agent shown in Azure DevOps.

Config.Name: Azure Agent Work Folder
Config.Description: Azure Pipelines work folder. Leave as _work unless you need a custom value.

Config.Name: Use GitHub Actions Runner
Config.Description: Set to true to enable the GitHub Actions Runner.

Config.Name: GitHub Scope
Config.Description: Use repo for a repository runner, or org for an organization runner.

Config.Name: GitHub PAT
Config.Description: GitHub PAT used to request runner registration tokens. For repo scope, grant Administration Read & Write on the selected repository.

Config.Name: GitHub Runner Name
Config.Description: Name of the GitHub Actions Runner shown in GitHub.

Config.Name: GitHub Runner Labels
Config.Description: Comma-separated GitHub runner labels, for example SelfHosted,unraid,pwsh.

Config.Name: GitHub Runner Work Folder
Config.Description: GitHub Actions work folder. Leave as _work unless you need a custom value.

Config.Name: Enable Embedded Docker
Config.Description: Set to true to enable Docker builds inside the runner container. Requires --privileged in Extra Parameters.

Config.Name: Advanced Docker Options
Config.Description: Optional extra options passed to the embedded Docker daemon. Leave empty for default.
